name: Raspberry Cream-Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a bowl, mix together the butter and cake mix until well combined. Press this mixture into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
3. In another bowl, beat the cream cheese with confectioner's sugar and eggs until creamy. Mix in 3-5 drops of red food coloring.
4. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the cake mix layer.
5. Reduce oven temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake for 35 minutes or until lightly browned on top. Allow to cool completely before cutting and serving. Makes 48 bars.
